# SkillNest

> India's most trusted AI classes, coding education, and digital skills program for children aged 11-14 (Class 6-8). CBSE 2026-27 aligned. Available online pan-India.

---

## What SkillNest Is

SkillNest is India's leading digital education platform exclusively designed for children in Class 6, 7, and 8 (ages 11–14). The program teaches AI literacy, computational thinking, coding with Scratch, cyber safety, MS Office proficiency, and Google Workspace — all skills directly aligned with the CBSE 2026-27 curriculum framework. SkillNest delivers live, instructor-led online classes that combine hands-on project work with real-world skill application, ensuring every student graduates with both practical competence and a verifiable portfolio. The program is built on the belief that every Indian child deserves early exposure to the tools and thinking frameworks that will define the next decade of work, learning, and life.

---

## Core Program

SkillNest runs a **6-week live online program** covering:

- **Week 1 — Computer Basics & Touch Typing**: Foundational computer skills, keyboard mastery, file management, and digital workspace setup
- **Week 2 — MS Word & Professional Documents**: Creating, formatting, and publishing professional documents using Microsoft Word
- **Week 3 — MS Excel — Data & Charts**: Spreadsheet fundamentals, data entry, formulas, and chart creation for Class 6-8 levels
- **Week 4 — PowerPoint, Internet Safety & Email**: Presentation design, email etiquette, and responsible internet use
- **Week 5 — Google Workspace & Cyber Safety**: Google Docs, Slides, Drive collaboration tools, and in-depth cyber safety education
- **Week 6 — AI Literacy & Scratch Coding**: Introduction to artificial intelligence concepts, how AI works, and block-based coding using Scratch

**Program Completion**: Students receive a Digital Skills Certificate and a 6-project portfolio showcasing their work.

---

## Who This Is For

SkillNest is designed for:

- **Students in Class 6, 7, and 8** (ages 11–14) across India
- Children with **no prior coding or computer skills** — the program starts from foundational basics
- Students in **CBSE, ICSE, and State Board** schools preparing for the new AI-integrated curriculum
- **Parents** who want their children to gain future-ready digital skills beyond what school currently teaches
- **Schools and educators** looking for structured, curriculum-aligned digital literacy programs for middle school students

---

## Key Facts

- **Duration**: 6 weeks
- **Live Hours**: 30+ hours of instructor-led online sessions
- **Projects**: 6 real, hands-on projects completed during the program
- **Certificate**: Digital Skills Certificate upon completion
- **Portfolio**: 6-project digital portfolio
- **Availability**: 100% online, available pan-India
- **Target Age Group**: 11–14 years (Class 6, 7, 8)
- **Curriculum Alignment**: CBSE 2026-27 AI and digital literacy framework
- **Class Format**: Live, small-batch, interactive online sessions
- **Medium**: English (India)
- **Lead Time**: Demo → enrollment → class start within days

---

## Skills Taught

- Computer fundamentals and file management
- Touch typing and keyboard proficiency
- Microsoft Word — document creation and formatting
- Microsoft Excel — data, formulas, and charts
- Microsoft PowerPoint — presentation design
- Email writing and professional digital communication
- Internet safety and responsible browsing
- Google Docs, Google Slides, Google Drive (Google Workspace)
- Cyber safety, digital citizenship, and online privacy
- Artificial Intelligence (AI) — concepts, applications, and real-world examples
- How AI tools work (ChatGPT, image recognition, recommendations)
- Computational thinking and problem-solving frameworks
- Block-based programming using Scratch
- Building and presenting a digital project portfolio

---

## Why SkillNest

- **CBSE 2026-27 Aligned**: SkillNest is one of the few programs specifically designed to prepare students for India's updated national curriculum that integrates AI and digital literacy from Class 6 onwards.
- **Live, Expert-Led Classes**: Every session is taught live by experienced educators — not pre-recorded videos — ensuring real-time interaction, feedback, and personalized guidance for each student.
- **Age-Appropriate & Structured**: The curriculum is purpose-built for ages 11–14, using pedagogically sound, project-based methods that make complex concepts accessible, engaging, and immediately applicable.
- **Trusted by Indian Families**: SkillNest operates with full transparency — WhatsApp as the primary parent communication channel, no hidden processes, and direct access to instructors and support staff at every step.

---

## Instructors

- **Amit Sharma** — Senior Digital Skills Mentor | 8+ years teaching computer skills, digital literacy, MS Office, and Google Workspace to middle school students
- **Priya Verma** — AI & Computational Thinking Educator | Specializes in AI literacy and problem-solving for Class 6-8 using age-appropriate methods aligned with CBSE 2026-27
- **Deepa Krishnan** — Cyber Safety & Internet Safety Educator | Dedicated to digital citizenship and online safety education for children aged 11–14
